Name: SP_EFFECT_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for special effects.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Product
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the Product version package.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon id to display in the interface whilst the effect is active.

Fields.Name: Trigger at HP Below %
Fields.Description:
The maximum percentage of HP required for effect to activate.
-1 = no requirement, 40 = less than 40% HP, 80 = less than 80% HP

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of effect. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Trigger Interval
Fields.Description: The interval for the contents of this effect to be reapplied. 0 = once per frame. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP %
Fields.Description:
Multiplies maximum HP. See bCurrHPIndependeMaxHP to determine how current HP behaves.
1 = default, .5 = -50%, 2 = +100%

Fields.Name: Maximum MP %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum MP.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stamina %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum stamina.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: Multiplies slash physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: Multiplies strike physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: Multiplies thrust physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: Multiplies Kinetic damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Energy
Fields.Description: Multiplies Energy damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Explosive
Fields.Description: Multiplies Explosive damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Coral
Fields.Description: Multiplies Coral damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: Multiplies Kinetic damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Energy
Fields.Description: Multiplies Energy damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Explosive
Fields.Description: Multiplies Explosive damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Coral
Fields.Description: Multiplies Coral damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Attack %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: Multiplies Kinetic damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Energy
Fields.Description: Multiplies Energy damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Explosive
Fields.Description: Multiplies Explosive damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Coral
Fields.Description: Multiplies Coral damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Damage: Kinetic
Fields.Description: Adds Kinetic damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Damage: Energy
Fields.Description: Adds Energy damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Damage: Explosive
Fields.Description: Adds Explosive damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Damage: Coral
Fields.Description: Adds Coral damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: Multiplies Kinetic defense.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Energy
Fields.Description: Multiplies Energy defense.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Explosive
Fields.Description: Multiplies Explosive defense.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Coral
Fields.Description: Multiplies Coral defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Kinetic
Fields.Description: Adds to Kinetic defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Energy
Fields.Description: Adds to Energy defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Explosive
Fields.Description: Adds to Explosive defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Coral
Fields.Description: Adds to Coral defense.

Fields.Name: Damage on Hit %: Unguarded
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage suffered by the target if it is not guarding when hit.

Fields.Name: Damage on Hit %: Weak Point
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage suffered by the target if it is hit in a part designated as a 'weak point'.

Fields.Name: Damage on Hit %: Standard
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage suffered by the target if it is hit normally.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP Source Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the maxHpRate values present on the character this effect belongs to.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description:
The ID of BehaviorParam or BehaviorParam_PC to apply to the effect's owner.
Requires stateInfo 142 to function for non-player characters.
Requires stateInfo 171 to function for player characters.

Fields.Name: Damage HP by Percentage
Fields.Description: Causes HP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a percentage of the maximum HP of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage HP by Point
Fields.Description: Causes HP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: Damage MP by Percentage
Fields.Description: Causes MP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a percentage of the maximum MP of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage MP by Point
Fields.Description: Causes MP loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: MP Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The amount of MP recovered per second.

Fields.Name: Damage Stamina by Percentage
Fields.Description: Causes Stamina loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a percentage of the maximum MP of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage Stamina by Point
Fields.Description: Causes Stamina loss to the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The amount of stamina recovered per second.

Fields.Name: Magic Effect Duration Change
Fields.Description:
For only spells whose effect duration is set to 0.1 seconds or more, add or subtract the time set to the effect duration.

Lingering Dragoncrest Ring uses stateinfo 193 which checks for isExtendSpEffectLife.

Fields.Name: Damage Durability by Point
Fields.Description: Causes Durability loss to the used equipment of the character this effect belongs to by the set value. Negative values will restore. The value is a flat value.

Fields.Name: Hits per Durability Loss
Fields.Description: Affects hits required before durability is consumed. 5 = +5 hits before durability consumed, -5 = -5 hits before durability consumed

Fields.Name: Attack %: Stamina
Fields.Description: Multiplies stamina damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Burn
Fields.Description: Also known as ACS Anomaly. Adds to the amount of Burn status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Stun
Fields.Description: Also known as Electric Discharge. Adds to the amount of Stun status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Plasma
Fields.Description: Adds to the amount of Plasma status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Curse
Fields.Description: Adds to the amount of Curse status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage %
Fields.Description: Does nothing. Fall control effects use stateInfo 47

Fields.Name: Mission Score %
Fields.Description: Multiplies score received from enemies during missions.

Fields.Name: Equipment Weight %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum equip weight.

Fields.Name: Item Weight %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum item weight. Does nothing. Probable DeS remnant.

Fields.Name: Mission Score
Fields.Description: Flat increase/decrease to mission score.

Fields.Name: Animation ID Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets animation IDs. Frequently used to make enemies swap movesets.

Fields.Name: Mission Score Possession %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the amount of score granted after death. Requires base value in character's NpcParam row.

Fields.Name: Target Priority Addition
Fields.Description: Chance for an enemy to switch aggro targets to/away the effect's owner. Values range from -1 to 1. +1 = 100% chance to target owner instead of current target, -1 = 100% chance to target somebody else instead of current target (effect owner).

Fields.Name: Visual Search Magnification % - For Enemy
Fields.Description: The value to magnify the effect owner's target's visual range by.

Fields.Name: Visual Search Magnification % - For Enemy in Combat
Fields.Description: The value to magnify the effect owner's target's visual range by, when in combat.

Fields.Name: Auditory Search Magnification %
Fields.Description: The value to magnify the effect owner's target's hearing range by.

Fields.Name: Set Curse Resistance
Fields.Description: The effect owner's Curse resistance is set to this value.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Burn
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based Burn resistance.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Stun
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based Stun resistance.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Plasma
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based Plasma resistance.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Curse
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based Curse resistance.

Fields.Name: Soul Steal %
Fields.Description: The defense power against HP loss when soul steal move is used.

Fields.Name: Effect Duration Change %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the duration of the status effect with the stateInfo specified by lifeReductionType.

Fields.Name: HP Recovery %
Fields.Description: Multiplies healing received.

Fields.Name: Expire SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The ID of spEffectParam to add once this effect ends.

Fields.Name: Cycle SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The ID of spEffectParam to add once every motionInterval.

Fields.Name: Attack SpEffect ID
Fields.Description:
ID of spEffectParam to add to victim when the owner hits an enemy.
Requires stateInfo 152 or 153 (and likely other values used for weapon buffs) to work (VFX present)

Fields.Name: Guard Defense Repulsion %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to guard defense (for deflection).

Fields.Name: Guard Stability %
Fields.Description: Multiplies shield stability. Requires stateInfo 158 (magic shield) or stateInfo 204 (great magic shield) to work (VFX present). Note that stability values over 100 nullify all stamina damage.

Fields.Name: Raycast Passed Time
Fields.Description: Activation time for passing the line of sight (used for the Evil Eye). In milliseconds.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Flat increase/decrease to poise. Requires stateInfo 155 to work.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Distance %
Fields.Description: Addition to the bowDistRate field of the held weapon for the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: SpEffect Category
Fields.Description: Determines special effect stacking behavior; how effects will react when another effect in the same category is added.

Fields.Name: Category Priority
Fields.Description: Used with specific spCategory values to determine stacking behavior. The higher the value, the lower the priority.

Fields.Name: Save Category
Fields.Description: Used to save effects so that they remain after quitting and loading the game. Only one effect per saveCategory is saved.

Fields.Name: Attunement Slots (Magic)
Fields.Description: Increases attunement slots.

Fields.Name: Attunement Slots (Miracle)
Fields.Description: Increases attunement slots.

Fields.Name: Damage: Humanity
Fields.Description: Flat increase/decrease to humanity stat. -1 = add 1 humanity, 1 = remove 1 humanity

Fields.Name: Repulsion Defense
Fields.Description: Modifies the repulsion defense for the effect owner's current weapon.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Damage Absorption %
Fields.Description: The absorption rate to use when calculating the repulsion damage for the effect owner's current weapon.

Fields.Name: Plasma Damage Incurred %
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the damage portion of the Plasma status effect when it is triggered on the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: No Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Small Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Medium Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Large Impact
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Medium Blow
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Push
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Strike
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Small Blow
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Minimal
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Uppercut
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Blow Backwards
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Breath
Fields.Description: The damage animation to use for this damage level if it is applied to the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Attack attribute to use when applying attack against the victim for attacks from this effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to use when applying attack against the victim for attacks from this effect's owner.

Fields.Name: State Info
Fields.Description:
ID of hardcoded system to use for unique effects. Causes effects itself and is necessary for certain fields to work.
Also used for visual effects by referring to the ID of a SpEffectVfxParam to use if useSpEffectEffect is true.

Fields.Name: Weapon Influence Type
Fields.Description: Determines how specific fields, such as damage modifiers, behave with certain attack categories

Fields.Name: Movement Type
Fields.Description: Offsets character movement animations.

Fields.Name: Effect Duration Change Type
Fields.Description: Determines the type of status effect to modify the duration of. SpEffects with the specified stateInfo will be affected.

Fields.Name: Throw Condition
Fields.Description: Affects the throwing masks.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID: Condition
Fields.Description: A condition value for the BehaviorJudgeId value used by the current owner.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID: Add
Fields.Description: A value for the BehaviorJudgeId value used by the current owner.

Fields.Name: Apply to Self
Fields.Description: Will affect the effect's owner.

Fields.Name: Apply to Friend
Fields.Description: Will affect the effect's owner's allies.

Fields.Name: Apply to Enemy
Fields.Description: Will affect the effect's owner's enemies.

Fields.Name: Apply to Player
Fields.Description: Will affect the player.

Fields.Name: Apply to Non-Player
Fields.Description: Will affect non-player characters.

Fields.Name: Apply to Host
Fields.Description: Will affect host player in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Phantom
Fields.Description: Will affect all types of client players in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Friendly Phantom
Fields.Description: Will affect friendly client players in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Hostile Phantom
Fields.Description: Will affect hostile client players in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Apply to Attacker
Fields.Description:
When effect is added via equipParamWeapon spEffectBehavior field, this field determines if the effect will be applied to attacked enemies instead of the effect owner.
true = affects victim, false = affects owner

Fields.Name: Display Icon when Inactive
Fields.Description: If ON, the interface icon for the effect will still disabled even if the effect is inactive due to a failed conditional check.

Fields.Name: Trigger Particles via SpEffect
Fields.Description: If ON, visual effects via SpEffectVfxParam will be used. See stateInfo for the ID of SpEffectVfxParam to be used.

Fields.Name: Apply Intelligence Correction
Fields.Description: If ON, the intelligence stat will be used to correct various fields, such as damage.

Fields.Name: Apply Faith Correction
Fields.Description: If ON, the faith stat will be used to correct various fields, such as damage.

Fields.Name: Apply Modifiers only after Game Clear
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will only be active in NG+ or higher.

Fields.Name: Apply Modifiers to Sorcery
Fields.Description: If ON, damage and scaling fields will apply to sorcery and pyromancies.

Fields.Name: Apply Modifiers to Miracles
Fields.Description: If ON, damage and scaling fields will apply to miracles.

Fields.Name: Clear Mission Score
Fields.Description: Sets mission score to 0.

Fields.Name: Request: Friendly Phantom
Fields.Description: Used only by White Sign Soapstone. Probably used for network matchmaking.

Fields.Name: Request: Hostile Phantom
Fields.Description: Used only by Red Sign Soapstone. Probably used for network matchmaking.

Fields.Name: Request: Invader
Fields.Description: Used only by (Cracked) Red Eye Orb. Probably used for network matchmaking.

Fields.Name: Request: Kick Phantom
Fields.Description: Possibly kicks all clients out of your world.

Fields.Name: Request: Leave
Fields.Description: Used only by Black Separation Crystal. Probably used to leave network sessions.

Fields.Name: Request: Character Invader
Fields.Description: Used only by Black Eye Orb (Lautrec quest and cut Shiva quest).

Fields.Name: Is Owner Undying
Fields.Description: If ON, character cannot become a corpse (and thus die).

Fields.Name: Ignore Current HP on Max HP Change
Fields.Description: Determines how current HP behaves when maximum HP is modified. true = current HP will not change, false = current HP will change with max HP

Fields.Name: Disable Durability
Fields.Description: If ON, disables durability damage to the effect owner's weapons and armor.

Fields.Name: Ignore Visual Search Adjustments
Fields.Description: If ON, visual search adjustments from sightSearchEnemyCut are ignored by the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Ignore Auditory Search Adjustments
Fields.Description: If ON, auditory search adjustments from hearingSearchEnemyCut are ignored by the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Ignore Magic Block
Fields.Description: If ON, magic blocking effects are ignored by the effect owner (Vow of Silence).

Fields.Name: Ignore Decoy Target
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will ignore fake targets (Aural Decoy projectiles).

Fields.Name: Ignore Decoy Target (Undead)
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will ignore fake undead targets (Alluring Skull projectiles).

Fields.Name: Ignore Decoy Target (Animal)
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will ignore fake animal targets.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Uranium
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to Uranium.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Burn
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to Burn.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Stun
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to Stun.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Plasma
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to Plasma.

Fields.Name: Is Immune to Curse
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner becomes immune to curse.

Fields.Name: Stop Curse
Fields.Description: If ON, effect owner curse status will not increase or decrease.

Fields.Name: Enable Duration via TimeAct Event
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect duration can be extended by a TimeAct event..

Fields.Name: Enable Target Activation
Fields.Description: If ON, enable the activation conditions for the Evil Eye.

Fields.Name: Cancel Effect on Explosive Damage
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will be cancelled early if Explosive damage is applied to the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Spell Duration Extension
Fields.Description: Determines if effectEndurance will be affected by stateInfo 193 which is used by the Lingering Dragoncrest Ring.

Fields.Name: Do not Sync in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Do not synchronize with the net. It does not mean that you will be able to call it locally, but simply do not send it online. For example, a remote character does not activate locally, so nothing happens in that case.

Fields.Name: Use Strength Correction
Fields.Description: Do you want to correct your strength?

Fields.Name: Use Dexterity Correction
Fields.Description: Do you want to correct your workmanship?

Fields.Name: Apply to Charged Attacks
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect is applied to charged attacks.

Fields.Name: Apply to Throws
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect is applied to throws.

Fields.Name: Trigger: None
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in no covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 1
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 2
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 3
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 4
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 5
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 6
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 7
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 8
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 9
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 10
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 11
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 12
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 13
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 14
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Trigger: 15
Fields.Description: Effect usable while in ? covenant.

Fields.Name: Attacker Damage Level
Fields.Description: The damage level of the attacking side changes to this value.

Fields.Name: Visual Search Magnification %
Fields.Description: The value to magnify the effect owner's visual range by.

Fields.Name: Visual Search Magnification % - In Combat
Fields.Description: The value to magnify the effect owner's visual range by, when in combat.

Fields.Name: Trigger for Hostile Target
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will trigger if the current target is considered hostile.

Fields.Name: Trigger for Friendly Target
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will trigger if the current target is considered friendly.

Fields.Name: Trigger for Self Target
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will trigger if the current target is considered ourselves.

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: Replaces the effect owner's current team type with the specified type. Requires State Info 132 to apply.

Fields.Name: Dummy Polgon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for this effect.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 0
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Accumulator: SpEffect applied at Upper Limit
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when the accumulator reaches the upper limit value.

Fields.Name: Accumulator: Upper Limit Value
Fields.Description: The upper limit value to use for this accumulator.

Fields.Name: Accumulator: SpEffect applied at Lower Limit
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to apply when the accumulator reaches the lower limit value.

Fields.Name: Accumulator: Lower Limit Value
Fields.Description: The lower limit value to use for this accumulator.

Fields.Name: Accumulator: Increment Value
Fields.Description: The value to increment this accumulator by for each interval of this effect.

Fields.Name: Auditory Search Reduction %
Fields.Description:
The value to reduce the distance at which enemies hear the effect's owner.
0 = default, 50 = -50% hearing distance, 100 = -100% hearing distance

Fields.Name: Visual Search: Height Angle Override
Fields.Description: Override the height angle used for the visual search cone. Requires State Info 267

Fields.Name: Visual Search: Width Angle Override
Fields.Description: Override the width angle used for the visual search cone. Requires State Info 267

Fields.Name: Add Hollowing Level
Fields.Description: Add this value to the degree of death

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 1
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 2
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 3
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 4
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 5
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 6
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: VFX ID: 7
Fields.Description: The VFX row to use when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Inflict: Uranium
Fields.Description: Also known as Depleted Uranium. Adds to the amount of Uranium status effect inflicted.

Fields.Name: Invoked AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: Invoke a AI sound instance when this effect is applied.

Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect: Particle ID Offset
Fields.Description: The identifier of the foot SFX that is additionally generated during special effects. XYYZZZ ZZZ

Fields.Name: Defender Damage Level
Fields.Description: The damage level of the defending side changes to this value.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Toughness
Fields.Description: The absorption value to apply to toughness impacts.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type A
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to damage that is against NPCs tagged as Type A.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type B
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to damage that is against NPCs tagged as Type B.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type C
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to damage that is against NPCs tagged as Type C.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type D
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to damage that is against NPCs tagged as Type D.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type E
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to damage that is against NPCs tagged as Type E.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier %: Type F
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to damage that is against NPCs tagged as Type F.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Dark
Fields.Description: Multiplies Dark physical damage taken. Values below 1 mean damage is reduced, values above 1 mean damage is increased.

Fields.Name: Defense %: Dark
Fields.Description: Multiplies Dark defense.

Fields.Name: Defense: Dark
Fields.Description: Adds to Dark defense.

Fields.Name: Post-Defense Attack %: Dark
Fields.Description: Multiplies Dark damage dealt (post-defense, bypasses attack rating)

Fields.Name: Attack %: Dark
Fields.Description: Multiplies Dark damage dealt.

Fields.Name: Damage: Dark
Fields.Description: Adds Dark damage to attack rating.

Fields.Name: Full Sight in Darkness: Radius
Fields.Description: The radius (in metres) when within darkness where the effect owner can see fully.

Fields.Name: Full Sight in Darkness: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon from which the full sight in darkness radius is derived from.

Fields.Name: Trigger if HP is Above %
Fields.Description: This effect only triggers if the effect owner's HP is above this specified value.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption %
Fields.Description: Using the behavior parameters of the current weapon, multiply the stamina consumption values by this value.

Fields.Name: Item Discovery %
Fields.Description: The value to apply to the item discovery stat. Requires State Info 66 to apply.

Fields.Name: Auditory Search Correction %
Fields.Description: Corrects the audibility of AI sound by magnification.

Fields.Name: Status Resistance: Burn
Fields.Description: Adjust the Burn status resistance for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Status Resistance: Stun
Fields.Description: Adjust the Stun status resistance for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Status Resistance: Plasma
Fields.Description: Adjust the Plasma status resistance for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Status Resistance: Curse
Fields.Description: Adjust the Curse status resistance for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Status Resistance: Uranium
Fields.Description: Adjust the Uranium status resistance for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Post-Defense Attack %: Slash
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Slash damage  applied to the effect owner from an attacker (post-defense, bypasses attack rating).

Fields.Name: Attacker - Post-Defense Attack %: Strike
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Strike damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker (post-defense, bypasses attack rating).

Fields.Name: Attacker - Post-Defense Attack %: Thrust
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Strike damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker (post-defense, bypasses attack rating).

Fields.Name: Attacker - Post-Defense Attack %: Neutral
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Neutral damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker (post-defense, bypasses attack rating).

Fields.Name: Attacker - Attack %: Slash
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Slash damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Attack %: Strike
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Strike damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Attack %: Thrust
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Thrust damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Attack %: Neutral
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Neutral damage applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Damage: Slash
Fields.Description: The damage value (typed as Slash) applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Damage: Strike
Fields.Description: The damage value (typed as Strike) applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Damage: Thrust
Fields.Description: The damage value (typed as Thrust) applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Damage: Neutral
Fields.Description: The damage value (typed as Neutral) applied to the effect owner from an attacker.

Fields.Name: Correction: STR
Fields.Description: The correction value to apply to the STR stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: DEX
Fields.Description: The correction value to apply to the DEX stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: INT
Fields.Description: The correction value to apply to the INT stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: FTH
Fields.Description: The correction value to apply to the FTH stat.

Fields.Name: Correction: LCK
Fields.Description: The correction value to apply to the LCK stat.

Fields.Name: Skill Recovery: STR
Fields.Description: The amount of skill recovered based on the STR stat.

Fields.Name: Skill Recovery: DEX
Fields.Description: The amount of skill recovered based on the DEX stat.

Fields.Name: Skill Recovery: INT
Fields.Description: The amount of skill recovered based on the INT stat.

Fields.Name: Skill Recovery: FTH
Fields.Description: The amount of skill recovered based on the FTH stat.

Fields.Name: Wet Condition Type
Fields.Description: The type of wetness to apply when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Use Status Correction from Current Weapon
Fields.Description: If ON, the status attack power multiplier correction of the attack parameter of the current weapon is applied.

Fields.Name: Apply Attack Power Correction from Current Weapon
Fields.Description: If ON, the attack power multiplier correction of the attack parameter of the current weapon is applied.

Fields.Name: Persist through Death
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect will not be deleted even if the effect owner dies. Mainly used for death effects.

Fields.Name: Delete in Wait Mode
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect is deleted when in Wait mode. Wait mode is a state where the activation status change type or activation HP is met and the state is waiting to be activated. On the other hand, Sleep mode is a state where the priority is lowered due to the overwrite category, etc.

Fields.Name: Forget Target List
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner's target list will be cleared constantly.

Fields.Name: Has Part Immortality
Fields.Description: If ON, this effect owner has a part with immortality applied.

Fields.Name: Convert Damage into Stagger Critical
Fields.Description: If ON, the damage the effect owner receives will become a stagger critical.

Fields.Name: Exclude from Radar
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will be hidden within the radar display.

Fields.Name: Force Character Update
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner will be forcefully updated.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Poise Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Poise damage for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Kinetic - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Kinetic damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Energy - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Energy damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Explosive - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Explosive damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Coral - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Coral damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Dark - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Dark damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Energy damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Coral - From NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Coral damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Dark - From NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Dark damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Object
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Object damage for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Kinetic - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Kinetic damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Energy - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Energy damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Explosive - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Explosive damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Coral - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Coral damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Dark - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Dark damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Kinetic - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Kinetic damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Energy - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Energy damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Explosive - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Explosive damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Coral - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Coral damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Dark - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Dark damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Resistance %: Uranium
Fields.Description: Multiplies stat based Uranium resistance.

Fields.Name: Trigger on State Info: 1
Fields.Description: If the specified state info is present, this effect is activated.

Fields.Name: Trigger on State Info: 2
Fields.Description: If the specified state info is present, this effect is activated.

Fields.Name: Trigger on State Info: 3
Fields.Description: If the specified state info is present, this effect is activated.

Fields.Name: Collision Capsule Height %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the character's proxy height collision capsule.

Fields.Name: Search Awareness Correction: Self
Fields.Description: The search awareness correction to apply to the search angle for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Search Awareness Correction: Target
Fields.Description: The search awareness correction to apply to the search angle for the effect owner's target.

Fields.Name: Normal Lock-on: Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to extend the normal lock-on distance by. In metres.

Fields.Name: Normal Lock-on: Distance %
Fields.Description: The percentage distance to extend the normal lock-on distance by.

Fields.Name: Missile Lock-on: Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to extend the missile lock-on distance by. In metres.

Fields.Name: Missile Lock-on: Distance
Fields.Description: The percentage distance to extend the missile lock-on distance by.

Fields.Name: Missile Lock-on: Number of Multi-Locks
Fields.Description: The amount of multi-locks to add to the base amount of missile multi-locks.

Fields.Name: Missile Lock-on: Number of Multi-Locks %
Fields.Description: The percentage to multiply the base amount of missile multi-locks by.

Fields.Name: Searchability Magnification Correction: Self
Fields.Description: The search mangification correction to apply for the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Searchability Magnification Correction: Target
Fields.Description: The search mangification correction to apply for the effect owner's target.

Fields.Name: Seen Target - Visual Search Distance %: Out of Combat
Fields.Description: The visual search distance multiplier to apply for the effect owner's 'seen' target when not in combat.

Fields.Name: Seen Target - Visual Search Distance %: In Combat
Fields.Description: The visual search distance multiplier to apply for the effect owner's 'seen' target when in combat.

Fields.Name: Visual Search Distance %: Out of Combat
Fields.Description: The visual search distance multiplier to apply for the effect owner when not in combat.

Fields.Name: Visual Search Distance %: In Combat
Fields.Description: The visual search distance multiplier to apply for the effect owner when in combat.

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description: The amount of Poise damage to apply when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Line of Sight: Capsule Height %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the effect owner's collision capsule height when calculating line of sight.

Fields.Name: Sense: Distance Override
Fields.Description: Override the NpcThinkParam parameter for the Sense value of the effect owner with this value.

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Speed %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to Stamina recovery speed of the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Energy Capacity %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the energy capacity of the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Energy Recovery Speed %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to energy recovery speed of the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Energy Supply Efficiency %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the energy consumption of the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Change Energy %
Fields.Description: The percentage amount of energy to change in the effect owner when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Change Energy
Fields.Description: The point amount of energy to change in the effect owner when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Post-Recovery Energy Recovery Speed %
Fields.Description: If (Unit energy recovery amount - overall energy consumption) is positive, multiply it by this value to get energy recovery amount.

Fields.Name: Target Part: ID
Fields.Description: If -1, targets all parts.

Fields.Name: Target Part: Damage %
Fields.Description: The damage multiplier to apply for damage against the target part.

Fields.Name: Target Part: HP Revival %
Fields.Description: The HP revival rate for the target part.

Fields.Name: Target Part: HP Recovery %
Fields.Description: The HP recovery rate for the target part.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor: Damage %
Fields.Description: The damage percentage to apply to the effect owner's Pulse Armor when this effect is activated.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor: Damage
Fields.Description: The damage to apply to the effect owner's Pulse Armor when this effect is activated.

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption %: Ground Boost
Fields.Description: The energy consumption multiplier to apply for a ground boost when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption %: Aerial Boost
Fields.Description: The energy consumption multiplier to apply for an aerial boost when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption %: Vertical Boost
Fields.Description: The energy consumption multiplier to apply for a vertical boost when this effect is present.

Fields.Name: Stealth Power %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to stealth performance.

Fields.Name: Override Group ID
Fields.Description: The override category this effect belongs to.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Impact - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Impact damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Impact - From NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Impact damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a NPC.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Impact - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Impact damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Impact - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Impact damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Normal Lock-on Distance: Override
Fields.Description: Overrides the normal lock-on distance (setting it to this specified value).

Fields.Name: Damage: Accumulative Impact %
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the accumulative impact against the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Pulse Armor - Against Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Pulse Armor damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an player.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Pulse Armor - Against NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Pulse Armor damage for the effect owner, if the defender is considered an NPC.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Pulse Armor - From Player
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Pulse Armor damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a player.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Pulse Armor - From NPC
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming Pulse Armor damage for the effect owner, if the attacker is considered a NPC.

Fields.Name: Damage %: Impact
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to outgoing Pulse Armor damage for the effect owner.
